findings.title: Ciphertext count leaks a narrow plaintext-length interval
findings.impact: Reveals that plaintext length is between 301 and 315 bytes
findings.recommendation: Pad plaintexts to fixed public size classes

findings.title: Stale documentation checksum
findings.impact: Release integrity verification reports a false mismatch
findings.recommendation: Generate checksums after release content is finalized

findings.title: Pointer-addition bounds check can be hardened
findings.impact: Potential undefined behavior on adversarial extreme lengths
findings.recommendation: Compare requested length against remaining bytes before pointer arithmetic

findings.title: Noncanonical field encodings are normalized
findings.impact: Permissive paths may accept multiple encodings for one field value

findings.title: Ambiguous R_com internal/wire lifecycle
findings.impact: Maintenance risk across proof and wire representations
